results.description: The Apex Court did not interfere with the judgment of the Allahabad High Court, which stated that cancellation of the GST registration without furnishing proper reasons is not lawfully sustainable. The court permitted the taxpayer to pursue the regulatory appeal and extended the limitation period for filing the appeal. results.title: IMD Issues Thunderstorm and Rain Alert For Assam, Next 3 Hours
results.description: The short-range weather alert has been issued by the India Meteorological Department (IMD), indicating the possibility of light thunderstorms accompanied by lightning activity over several parts of Assam , including Guwahati , in the next three hours. The rainfall intensity is expected to range between 1 and 2 cm per hour in isolated pockets, which may lead to brief periods of reduced visibility and water accumulation in low-lying areas. The districts that are most likely to experience these weather conditions include Kamrup, Kamrup Metropolitan, Morigaon, and West Karbi Anglong. Residents in these regions are advised to remain cautious, particularly during lightning strikes, as such conditions can pose risks to life and property. Gusty winds may also accompany the thunderstorms, potentially causing minor disruptions such as falling tree branches or temporary power outages. The local authorities and disaster management teams are likely to remain on alert to respond to any emergencies arising from the sudden weather changes. People are urged to avoid open fields, tall structures, and water bodies during lightning activity, and to seek shelter indoors whenever possible. Commuters may face short-term disruptions due to wet roads and reduced visibility, especially during peak rainfall spells. Citizens are encouraged to plan their travel accordingly and stay updated with official weather advisories as conditions may evolve rapidly within a short span of time. Also Read: I MD Forecasts Moderate Rain, Thunderstorms in Guwahati, Nearby Districts
